type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Lower emission levels due to more summer months offline than last year and better emission controls (ie better control on ammonia injection). Summer months have higher ppm because the plant is not required to use NH3 injections (SCR) to bring NOx below 10ppm when plant load is below 270 kpph steam.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Lower fuel consumption due to a warmer year resulting in lower steam production.  This is especially driven by significantly lower oil consumption in 2015 due to less gas curtailments.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Lower fuel consumption due to a warmer year resulting in lower steam production.  This is especially driven by significantly lower oil consumption in 2015 due to less gas curtailments.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Higher emissions due to increase in oil consumption, especially since EF for oil combustion is a large value resulting in significant impact to emissions.  Average monthly NOx ppm from the CEM system was used to calculate NOx amount.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Higher oil consumption due to colder winter and more gas curtailment.  Since EF for oil combustion is greater than EF for gas combustion, the increase in emissions due to oil combustion offset the decrease in emissions due to gas combustion.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Higher oil consumption due to colder winter and more gas curtailments.  Since EF for oil combustion is greater than EF for gas combustion, the increase in emissions due to oil combustion offset the decrease in emissions due to gas combustion.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: NH3 injections (SCR) are used to bring NOx below 10ppm when plant load reached above 270k lb/hr of steam.  Average monthly NOx ppm from CEM system is used to calculate NOx amount.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Higher gas consumptions since plant was online for approximately 2 more months (Aug-Sept) during the year than historical years, per new operating strategy as a more efficient plant.  Oil Consumption increased due to gas curtailment at the end of the year.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Higher gas consumptions since plant is online for approximately 2 more months (Aug-Sept) during the year than historical years, per new operating strategy as a more efficient plant.  Oil Consumption increased due to gas curtailment at the end of the year.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Higher gas consumptions since plant is online for approximately 2 more months (Aug-Sept) during the year than historical years, per new operating strategy as a more efficient plant.  Oil Consumption increased due to gas curtailment at the end of the year.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The implementation of flue gas recirculation, heat recovery equipments, fine-tuning of boilers, and SCR permitted a reduction of NOx emission factor to drop down from previous year's 85ppm to 37.5ppm.  This was supported by an Enbridge study completed in November 2012 to measure NOx levels at Pearl St Steam Plant.  This reduction in the ppm offset the increase in natural gas combustion due to higher steam productions.  Change in operating strategy resulted in loads from another steam plant being shifted to Pearl St Steam Plant to take advantage of its higher efficiency.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increase in natural gas combustion due to higher steam productions. Change in operating strategy resulted in loads from another steam plant (Walton St Steam Plant) being shifted to Pearl St Steam Plant to take advantage of its higher efficiency.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increase in natural gas combustion due to higher steam productions. Change in operating strategy resulted in loads from another steam plant (Walton St Steam Plant) being shifted to Pearl St Steam Plant to take advantage of its higher efficiency.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increase in natural gas combustion due to higher steam productions. Change in operating strategy resulted in loads from another steam plant (Walton St Steam Plant) being shifted to Pearl St Steam Plant to take advantage of its higher efficiency.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Pearl St Steam Plant had more summer months offline than last year.  Summer months have higher ppm because the plant is not required to use NH3 injections (SCR) to bring NOx below 10ppm when plant load is below 270 kpph steam.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Lower gas and oil consumption due to warmer year in 2016 resulting in less steam production and less curtailment in 2016.  This plant also had partial firm gas with Enbridge starting 2016  which further reduced oil consumption during curtailment.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: Higher diesel generator use offsets the lower gas and oil consumption due to warmer year in 2016, resulting in higher emissions.  This plant also had partial firm gas with Enbridge starting 2016  which further reduced oil consumption during curtailment.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Higher diesel generator use offsets the lower gas and oil consumption due to warmer year in 2016, resulting in higher emissions.  This plant also had partial firm gas with Enbridge starting 2016  which further reduced oil consumption during curtailment.

comments.comment:
higher gas due to colder year in 2017 resulting in more steam production.  This plant also had longer operating time during summer than 2016
The above also caused higher oil consumption in addition to extended testing periods on oil.
Also commissioning and operation of a new 4 MW CoGen plant contributed in increasing gas consumption

reasonsForNoActivities.en: Activities were implemented in a previous year; additional activities are either unnecessary or unfeasible at this time
